en.title: El Nabatat Island
en.extract: El Nabatat Island or Kitchener's Island is a small, oval-shaped island in the Nile at Aswan, Egypt. It is less than a kilometer long and its width is less than ½ a kilometer. The Aswan Botanical Garden is located on the island.
en.description: Island in the Nile River at Aswan, Egypt
